item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in direct judgment mode and treated the prompt as metric trend decision analysis, not as a triage/local-repair pattern. It gave a conditional but actionable decision: do not stop the old plan until complaint direction and severity are known; if new-plan complaints are higher, retain old plan and reduce/fix new; if old-plan complaints are higher, phase out old by segment. No triage framework or over-methodized stop appeared."}
